header.title: Fleksibilitet og mobilitet
header.subtitle: Improve range of motion and prevent injuries

player.bilateral_hint: 💡 Remember to switch sides when the timer ends

complete.title: Rutine fullført!
complete.rate_label: Føler du deg bedre? Rate your improvement: {{rating}}/10

upper-body.name: Overkroppen åpen
upper-body.desc: Slipp spenningen fra skrivebordsarbeid og telefonbruk

Doorway Chest Stretch.name: Døråpningsbryststrekk
Doorway Chest Stretch.desc: Stand in doorway, place forearms on frame, lean forward to feel chest stretch.

Shoulder Rolls.name: Skulderruller
Shoulder Rolls.desc: Roll shoulders backward in large circles, 10 reps.

Thoracic Rotation.name: Thorax rotasjon
Thoracic Rotation.desc: On hands and knees, rotate upper body side to side, opening chest.

Neck Stretch.name: Nakkestrekk
Neck Stretch.desc: Gently tilt head to each side, holding for 30 seconds per side.

Tricep Stretch.name: Triceps stretch
Tricep Stretch.desc: Reach arm overhead, bend elbow, gently pull with other hand.

lower-body.name: Utløser underkropp
lower-body.desc: Deep stretches for tight legs and hips from sitting

Pigeon Pose.name: Duestilling
Pigeon Pose.desc: Bring one leg forward bent, extend back leg straight, sink hips down.

Hamstring Stretch.name: Hamstring stretch
Hamstring Stretch.desc: Sit with one leg extended, reach toward toes, keep back straight.

Hip Flexor Lunge.name: Hip Flexor Lunge
Hip Flexor Lunge.desc: Lunge position, push hips forward to feel stretch in front hip.

Glute Stretch.name: Glute Stretch
Glute Stretch.desc: Lying on back, cross ankle over opposite knee, pull toward chest.

Calf Stretch.name: Kalvstrekk
Calf Stretch.desc: Step forward in lunge, keep back heel down to stretch calf.

Cat-Cow.name: Katt-ku
Cat-Cow.desc: On hands and knees, alternate arching and rounding spine.

Downward Dog.name: Nedadgående hund
Downward Dog.desc: Hands and feet planted, hips high, forming an inverted V.

Child's Pose.name: Barns positur
Child's Pose.desc: Knees wide, sit back on heels, arms extended forward.

Seated Twist.name: Sittende Twist
Seated Twist.desc: Sit cross-legged, rotate torso to each side, hand behind back.

Forward Fold.name: Foroverfold
Forward Fold.desc: Stående, hengsel i hoftene, nå mot tærne, la hodet henge.

Hip Circles.name: Hofte sirkler
Hip Circles.desc: Hendene på hoftene, lag store sirkler med hoftene i begge retninger.

Arm Circles.name: Armsirkler
Arm Circles.desc: Strekk ut armene bredt, lag store sirkler fremover og deretter bakover.

Leg Swings.name: Bensvingninger
Leg Swings.desc: Hold veggen, sving benet frem og tilbake, så side til side.

Arm Circles.name: Armsirkler
Arm Circles.desc: Small to large circles, forward and backward.

Torso Twists.name: Torso Twists
Torso Twists.desc: Rotate upper body side to side with arms loose.

Walking Lunges.name: Walking Lunges
Walking Lunges.desc: Gå frem i utfall, bytt ben mens du beveger deg fremover.

High Knees.name: Høye knær
High Knees.desc: March in place bringing knees to hip height.

sit-reach.name: Sit & Reach-test
sit-reach.desc: Sit with legs straight, reach toward toes

shoulder-pass.name: Skulderpassering
shoulder-pass.desc: Hold et bånd/pinne, løft armene over hodet og bak ryggen

deep-squat.name: Deep Squat Hold
deep-squat.desc: Squat down with heels flat, hold for 30 seconds

heatmap.title: Gjenopprettingsvarmekart
heatmap.legend: Purple dots mark days with recovery sessions

badge.title: Skadebevis!
badge.desc: Du har fullført {{count}} gjenopprettingsøkter denne uken!
